claims.statement: On this machine and the recorded five-million-cell numeric level 1 targeted-upsert workload, median total editor, mutation, transform and source-scan/action residual time decreased by 5.77%, 10.30%, 11.53% and 14.21% respectively versus the immediately preceding same-machine batching profile; timing remains system-sensitive and this is not a cross-machine guarantee.

The recorded five-million-cell numeric transform reduced 26000006 parsed events to 16000068 source callbacks and 11001084 transform action callbacks, used a 262144-byte peak owned output buffer and recorded an 8.79297 MB median process peak working set.

The one-million-cell distribution matrix covered numeric, mixed inline strings, sharedStrings and formula metadata; the formula fixture also retained its external A1 hyperlink relationship and worksheet binding. These profiles are compatibility/distribution evidence, not broad elapsed-time claims.

The runner verified output-plan byte accounting and exact compressed payload equality for every planned raw-copy entry in all warm-up and measured outputs, and each median representative opened with openpyxl 3.1.5. Microsoft Office was not run.
The implementation passed production and stored-only 130-test CTest profiles, the no-images smoke and installed-package consumer builds for production, stored-only and no-images profiles.
